name_en: Dior Book Tote New Leather Tote❗️
name_cn:
Dior Book Tote New Leather Tote❗️
Blue Oblique with Original Cowhide Medium🔥
The invincible classic Oblique print tote plus shoulder strap practicality up up!
The front is still the popular Oblique print, the side uses original cowhide reinforcement, making the bag structured and textured!
The classic navy blue continues the versatile characteristics,
Can match various style outfits
Can be carried by hand or crossbody, satisfying multiple carrying methods.
8005
size: 36*27*16cm
